what_was_built: reports/portfolio_capital_efficiency_overlap_correlation_method_v1/overlap_correlation_method.json (machine-readable P4 method: 8 overlap/correlation measures + independence classification + required frozen series + global validation rules; all computed_in_this_bundle=false)
tests/test_portfolio_capital_efficiency_overlap_correlation_method.py (28 tests covering schema + safety + spec-only + C10 deferral + validator failure modes + P0/P1/P2/P3 companions)
methods_defined: simultaneous_capital_at_risk_overlap (sum min/sum max of car series)
same_symbol_overlap (fraction of simultaneous in-position time on same canonical symbol)
return_stream_correlation (Pearson rho_ij over aligned T_common >= N_min; consumed by P2+P3)
redundancy_score (pre-declared-weighted blend; only max(rho,0) feeds it)

c10_deferral_record.c10_working_tree_state: untouched (pre-existing M on tools/c10_real_candle_detection_once.py and tests/test_c10_real_candle_detection_once_runner_purity.py left exactly as found)
c10_deferral_record.note: C10's per-trade/per-period series are exactly the shape these measures consume, but C10 is deferred -- eligible only once it has its own FROZEN, committed replay artifact admitted under P1.

distinction_phrases_required_in_md: No real overlap or correlation is computed in this bundle.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
An advisory allocation is not an execution instruction.
Candidate #10 remains deferred and is not connected by this method.

registry_integration.note: Shared tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py intentionally NOT modified (additive-only / surgical).

no_profit_claim: This method does not imply edge and does not allocate capital.
A defined overlap or correlation measure does not imply profit.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
No allocation is authorized by this method alone.
